text_block_list.text:
The time has come! Among the<n>abundant shrines
and temples of<n>Kyoto, we face the grand trial for
the<n>Kikuka crown!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We worked so hard to get here, I can<n>almost see
my life passing before my<n>eyes...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
choice_data_list: I don't think it's your time to go just yet...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You're right! This is still onlythe beginning!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is a fiendishly long<n>3,000 meters.
I've never raced such<n>a distance before...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But with all this luck I've scraped<n>together, I'm
sure we'll make it<n>through somehow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Go forth, my little lucky charms!<n>Crush my
competition! And maybe<n>level off the dreaded
Yodo Hill while<n>you're at it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'll just sit back and see how it<n>goes...
choice_data_list: You better put in some effort too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, I know! I'm doing my<n>part. I drank my
lucky milk today to<n>keep my energy up.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If we get through this, no one will be<n>able to stand
against my faith. O gods,<n>let them see the power of
unparalleled luck!
